title: Yacht Charter in Corfu: Costs, Seasons & Tips for 2026
html:
A yacht charter in Corfu offers access to the Ionian Sea's finest anchorages, with prices starting from around EUR 450 for a half-day on a motorboat. Gouvia Marina is a popular departure point, and you can compare verified options through BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Corfu

Marinas, harbours and bays across the island provide convenient starting points for your charter. Gouvia Marina, about 6 km north of Corfu Town, is the main hub for yacht hire and boasts full facilities. You can boat hire Corfu for your chosen dates.

Other real departure points include Kerkyra Marina in the Old Port, the harbour at Kassiopi in the north-east, and the sheltered bay of Paleokastritsa on the west coast. The ports of Lefkimmi in the south and Benitses on the east coast are also well-used.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Corfu?

Prices range from about EUR 200 for a shared tour to over EUR 2,000 for a crewed yacht per day.

  • Shared tour (RIBs or glass-bottom boats): from EUR 200 per person for a half-day.
  • Small motorboat (6, 8 m, no licence required): from EUR 450 for half a day.
  • Catamaran or monohull (10, 15 m): from EUR 800 for a full day, bareboat.
  • Crewed yacht (with skipper and host): from EUR 1,500 per day, all-inclusive.

These rates are ballpark figures for 2026 and include basic insurance. For the most accurate prices, it is wise to explore boat hire Corfu on a platform that lists multiple operators with transparent pricing.

Which boat to rent in Corfu

Your choice should match your group size, budget and boating experience. One option worth a look is the Fairline listing.

  1. Motorboat (no licence), Best for small groups (up to 6) exploring nearby coves, from EUR 450 half-day.
  2. Sailing yacht (bareboat), Ideal for experienced sailors (up to 8) wanting a multi-day cruise, from EUR 700 per day.
  3. Catamaran (bareboat or crewed), Spacious and stable for families (up to 10), from EUR 900 full day.
  4. Luxury motor yacht (crewed), Like the Fairline Targa 43, perfect for a premium experience (up to 8), from EUR 1,800 per day. See the Fairline listing for specifications and availability.
  5. RIB tender (small), Nimble and fast for a quick hop to private beaches (up to 5), from EUR 200 half-day.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Corfu or list your own.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Corfu?

For most small motorboats up to 30 hp no licence is required; for larger vessels an ICC or equivalent is needed.

Greek law requires a recreational craft licence for boats with engines over 30 hp. Many charter companies offer licence-free boats under this limit, and for larger yachts a skipper can be hired. The operator always confirms the exact requirements at booking.

When chartering in high season (July to August), be prepared for the meltemi wind which can pick up in the afternoon; aim to return to harbour by 14:00 to avoid choppy seas.

At a glance: yacht charter in Corfu, 2026

  • Price band: EUR 200 to EUR 2,000+ per day
  • Peak months: July, August
  • Trip length: Half-day to multi-week
  • Guest capacity: 2 to 12 passengers
  • Local currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Corfu

Can I charter a yacht in Corfu without a skipper?

Yes, many operators offer bareboat charters provided you hold a valid licence (ICC or equivalent) and the operator approves your experience.

What is the best month for yacht charter in Corfu?

May, June and September offer warm weather, fewer crowds and more consistent winds, making them ideal for a relaxed sailing holiday.

How far is it from Corfu to the mainland or other islands?

The Greek mainland (Syvota) is roughly 10 nautical miles from Corfu's south coast, and a typical sailing day can cover 25 to 40 nautical miles.

Are pets allowed on charter boats in Corfu?

Pets are permitted on some vessels, but you must confirm with the operator and often pay an additional cleaning fee.

Whether you are a first-time renter or an experienced yacht owner, BoatHire24 connects you with verified boats and hosts across the globe. Consider listing your own boat to reach travellers seeking yacht charter in Corfu and beyond.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Corfu and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
